itemdesc-core: Focusing the released energy of a temporal gear into a diamond and attuning the gem to dense matter has created an unstable pocket dimension. A containment vessel will be required to stabilize it.
itemdesc-backpackbronze: Moderately increases the amount of items you can carry.
itemdesc-backpackiron: Moderately increases the amount of items you can carry.
itemdesc-backpacksteel: Moderately increases the amount of items you can carry.
itemdesc-grassbasket: Slightly increases the amount of items you can carry.
itemdesc-blackhole: Greatly increases the amount of items you can carry. You are able to reach into the rift as if it were a rucksack, unfortunately it's capacity is limited by the temporal gears power.
itemdesc-miningbasket-reed: A Handbasket Modified to better handle resources obtained from Mining
itemdesc-miningbasket-papyrus: A Handbasket Modified to better handle resources obtained from Mining
itemdesc-farmingbasket-reed: A Handbasket Modified to better handle resources obtained from Farming
itemdesc-forestrybasket-reed: A Handbasket Modified to better handle resources obtained from Woodcutting
itemdesc-farmingbasket-papyrus: A Handbasket Modified to better handle resources obtained from Farming
itemdesc-forestrybasket-papyrus: A Handbasket Modified to better handle resources obtained from Woodcutting
itemdesc-forestrybag: A Linnen Bag Modified to better handle resources obtained from Woodcutting.
itemdesc-farmingbag: A Linnen Bag Modified to better handle resources obtained from Farming.
